title: bartlettina
intro: Bartlettina is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is native to Central and South America, and it has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Bartlettina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Bartlettina can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
